sys_remote_update_set.name: ServiceNow MCP Companion (x_mcp_companion)
sys_remote_update_set.description: Companion baseline for health/version + ACL evaluate endpoints (scope-enforced).

sys_update_xml.name: sys_user_role_x_mcp_companion.api_user
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <record_update table="sys_user_role"> <sys_user_role action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_id>eba68245226b799b5677ae8bcf496e9c</sys_id> <name>x_mcp_companion.api_user</name> <description>Allows MCP Companion Scripted REST access.</description> <sys_scope display_value="x_mcp_companion">ff88c9eb5f52e35e34e169e1662eb9c9</sys_scope> <sys_package display_value="x_mcp_companion">05425b48370a80a791cd1f5e41a4f728</sys_package> </sys_user_role> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_XMcpCompanionVersion
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<record_update table="sys_script_include">
  <sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
    <sys_id>97e34efd81ff44b38413338f55ea4680</sys_id>
    <name>XMcpCompanionVersion</name>
    <api_name>x_mcp_companion.XMcpCompanionVersion</api_name>
    <active>true</active>
    <client_callable>false</client_callable>
    <description>MCP Companion health/version provider</description>
    <script><![CDATA[var XMcpCompanionVersion = Class.create();
XMcpCompanionVersion.prototype = {
  initialize: function () {},

  getInfo: function () {
    return {
      status: "ok",
      version: "1.0.0",
      app_scope: "x_mcp_companion",
      family: "Zurich"
    };
  },

  type: "XMcpCompanionVersion"
};
]]></script>
    <sys_scope display_value="x_mcp_companion">ff88c9eb5f52e35e34e169e1662eb9c9</sys_scope>
    <sys_package display_value="x_mcp_companion">05425b48370a80a791cd1f5e41a4f728</sys_package>
  </sys_script_include>
</record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_XMcpAclEvaluator
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<record_update table="sys_script_include">
  <sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
    <sys_id>6dbf030caa178dfa452a17ee83a38dc6</sys_id>
    <name>XMcpAclEvaluator</name>
    <api_name>x_mcp_companion.XMcpAclEvaluator</api_name>
    <active>true</active>
    <client_callable>false</client_callable>
    <description>MCP Companion ACL evaluation service</description>
    <script><![CDATA[var XMcpAclEvaluator = Class.create();
XMcpAclEvaluator.prototype = {
  initialize: function () {},

  evaluate: function (params) {
    var input = params || {};
    var table = String(input.table || "");
    var operation = String(input.operation || "read");
    var field = input.field ? String(input.field) : "*";

    if (!table) {
      return {
        decision: "indeterminate",
        reasoning_summary: "Missing required field: table",
        evaluated_acls: []
      };
    }

    var acl = new GlideRecord("sys_security_acl");
    acl.addQuery("name", "CONTAINS", table);
    acl.addQuery("operation", operation);
    acl.setLimit(10);
    acl.query();

    var evaluated = [];
    while (acl.next()) {
      evaluated.push({
        sys_id: String(acl.getUniqueValue()),
        name: String(acl.getValue("name") || ""),
        operation: String(acl.getValue("operation") || ""),
        active: String(acl.getValue("active") || "")
      });
    }

    return {
      decision: evaluated.length > 0 ? "indeterminate" : "indeterminate",
      reasoning_summary:
        "Companion ACL evaluation currently returns metadata-backed deterministic output. Runtime scripted ACL execution context is intentionally conservative.",
      evaluated_acls: evaluated,
      context: {
        table: table,
        operation: operation,
        field: field
      }
    };
  },

  type: "XMcpAclEvaluator"
};
]]></script>
    <sys_scope display_value="x_mcp_companion">ff88c9eb5f52e35e34e169e1662eb9c9</sys_scope>
    <sys_package display_value="x_mcp_companion">05425b48370a80a791cd1f5e41a4f728</sys_package>
  </sys_script_include>
</record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ws_operation_health
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<record_update table="sys_ws_operation">
  <sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
    <sys_id>679e6682c59199e8754b0e3e4b0abe1e</sys_id>
    <name>health</name>
    <http_method>GET</http_method>
    <relative_path>/health</relative_path>
    <active>true</active>
    <requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication>
    <requires_acl_authorization>true</requires_acl_authorization>
    <requires_snc_internal_role>false</requires_snc_internal_role>
    <operation_script><![CDATA[(function process(/*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {
  var provider = new XMcpCompanionVersion();
  response.setStatus(200);
  response.setBody({
    result: provider.getInfo()
  });
})(request, response);
]]></operation_script>
    <script><![CDATA[(function process(/*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {
  var provider = new XMcpCompanionVersion();
  response.setStatus(200);
  response.setBody({
    result: provider.getInfo()
  });
})(request, response);
]]></script>
    <web_service_definition display_value="x_mcp_companion">5da101f4744c6960a7a8519d82a5d47c</web_service_definition>
    <sys_scope display_value="x_mcp_companion">ff88c9eb5f52e35e34e169e1662eb9c9</sys_scope>
    <sys_package display_value="x_mcp_companion">05425b48370a80a791cd1f5e41a4f728</sys_package>
  </sys_ws_operation>
</record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ws_operation_acl_evaluate
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<record_update table="sys_ws_operation">
  <sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
    <sys_id>73f9207dd7f184a623ec9a86119f1089</sys_id>
    <name>acl_evaluate</name>
    <http_method>POST</http_method>
    <relative_path>/acl/evaluate</relative_path>
    <active>true</active>
    <requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication>
    <requires_acl_authorization>true</requires_acl_authorization>
    <requires_snc_internal_role>false</requires_snc_internal_role>
    <operation_script><![CDATA[(function process(/*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {
  var body = request.body && request.body.data ? request.body.data : {};
  var evaluator = new XMcpAclEvaluator();
  var result = evaluator.evaluate(body);

  response.setStatus(200);
  response.setBody({
    result: result
  });
})(request, response);
]]></operation_script>
    <script><![CDATA[(function process(/*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {
  var body = request.body && request.body.data ? request.body.data : {};
  var evaluator = new XMcpAclEvaluator();
  var result = evaluator.evaluate(body);

  response.setStatus(200);
  response.setBody({
    result: result
  });
})(request, response);
]]></script>
    <web_service_definition display_value="x_mcp_companion">5da101f4744c6960a7a8519d82a5d47c</web_service_definition>
    <sys_scope display_value="x_mcp_companion">ff88c9eb5f52e35e34e169e1662eb9c9</sys_scope>
    <sys_package display_value="x_mcp_companion">05425b48370a80a791cd1f5e41a4f728</sys_package>
  </sys_ws_operation>
</record_update>
